release_notes: DitakNet 2.0.1 — safer error logging, Request ID correlation, TrueNAS storage checks, CI smoke gates.

announcements.title: DitakNet 2.0.1
announcements.message: Pull ghcr.io/ditaknet-sudo/ditaknet:2.0.1, then restart. Create a backup first. Prefer version tags over latest in production.
